questionHtml: Formulate an equation for the neutralization of stomach acid with calcium carbonate, CaCO3 (s).
markschemeHtml:
CaCO3 (s) + 2HCl (aq) → CO2 (g) + CaCl2 (aq) + H2O (l)   [✔]

 

Note: Accept balanced ionic equations involving “H+” or “H3O+”.

Do not accept “H2CO3”.

meta.title: Formulate an equation for the neutralization of stomach acid with calcium carbonate, CaCO3 (s).
breadcrumbLabels: D.4 pH regulation of the stomach
